name: Connect Biopharma Holdings Ltd
summary: . Overview Connect Biopharma, headquartered in San Diego, California, is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company dedicated to transforming care for asthma and chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (COPD). The Company is advancing rademikibart, a next-generation, potentially best-in-class antibody designed to target interleukin-4-receptor alpha (IL-4R).
